description_long: This object is a short segment of railway track, featuring two parallel metallic rails held in place by a series of rectangular wooden sleepers. The rails are rendered in a silvery-gray color, suggesting steel, and are mounted atop the sleepers, which are depicted in alternating shades of brown, indicating wood. The structure is compact and blocky, with the rails running the full length of the object and the sleepers evenly spaced beneath them. There is no visible ballast bed or pavement embedding, and the track appears to be freestanding. The surface of the rails is smooth and slightly reflective, while the sleepers have a matte, textured appearance. No signage, fasteners, or additional railway infrastructure is present.
description: A compact railway track segment with two parallel steel rails mounted on brown wooden sleepers, lacking ballast or signage.
description_view_0: Front view showing the two parallel steel rails and the tops of the wooden sleepers beneath them.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the rails and the rectangular ends of the wooden sleepers.
description_view_2: Rear view, visually similar to the front, displaying the rails and sleeper tops from the opposite side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the rails' length and the sleeper ends, mirroring view 1.
